subject: Wrong and damaged order
body: I ordered a Blue Premium Widget (SKU WDG-PREM-BL) but received a Red Basic Widget instead — and to make things worse, the box was crushed and the product inside is cracked and unusable. Order ORD-62019. I need a replacement of the correct item sent immediately.

expected.notes: Legitimately both wrong_item AND damaged_item. Tests Intake's handling of multi-category inputs and whether verifier notes the ambiguity.
